CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY REZA, ALI POURTAKIN, MEHRDAD AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRPORTER SHUTLE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN AIRPORTER SHUTLE INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REZA, ALI POURTAKIN, MEHRDAD PARTIES ARE EQUALLY AT FAULT. NEITHER SIDE IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER FROM THE OTHER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AMERICAN AIRPORTER SHUTLE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT REZA, ALI POURTAKIN, MEHRDAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT REZA, ALI POURTAKIN, MEHRDAD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRPORTER SHUTLE INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
